name: Analytical routing speedup through basin-engine (real S3)
claim: Same SQL through the same engine entry point: with the analytical engine attached, GROUP BY queries route to DuckDB and finish at least 1.5x faster than the OLTP-only baseline on a 1M-row real-S3 dataset. v0.1 limitation: DuckDB needs a LocalFS root; httpfs is v0.2.

details.v01_limitation: basin-analytical requires local_fs_root; DuckDB httpfs is v0.2
